name: Bottleneck Hunter
description_en: AI-driven global supply-chain bottleneck scanner for value investors. Identifies choke points, maps upstream/downstream impacts, and turns them into actionable investment theses.
description_zh: AI 驱动的全球产业链瓶颈猎手，帮助价值投资者识别供应链卡脖子节点、梳理上下游影响并转化为可投资论点。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It scouts global supply-chain choke points, quantifies upstream/downstream ripple effects, and frames bottleneck discoveries as long/short investment theses with risk checks.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。它扫描全球产业链瓶颈，量化上下游传导影响，并把瓶颈发现转化为附带风险检查的多空投资论点。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from the repo's tools/ directory and performs web searches for supply-chain data. No external accounts required; verify data sources before trading.
sec_note_zh: 会运行仓库 tools/ 目录下的本地 Python 工具，并为供应链数据执行网络搜索。无需外部账号；交易前请核实数据来源。
